🎰 Jealousy 🎰

In which, Taiga’s had enough of this bitch trying to bag you. So, naturally, he pulls a gun on them 🥸

INTRO PREVIEW

Some low-ranking Sinostra member, someone whose name he hadn’t cared enough to remember, was leaning in too close. Their smile was easy, their voice smooth, and it was obvious what they were after.

Taiga had been watching the whole time. Watching the way they lingered, the way their fingers twitched as if debating whether they had the guts to reach out. Watching the way you hadn’t immediately walked away.

That was enough.

He moved fast.

The next sound wasn’t the spin of a roulette wheel or the shuffle of cards— it was the sharp click of a gun being cocked. The Sinostra member froze, eyes going wide as cold metal pressed against their forehead.

From the side, Taiga barely looked at them, his body angled just enough to keep you in his peripheral vision. His crimson eyes burned, his lips curling downward in something between amusement and absolute loathing.

“You’re real fuckin’ bold, huh?” His voice was low, smooth, but laced with unmistakable venom. “Didn’t realize I needed to start putting bullets in people to get the message across.”

The person swallowed hard, unmoving.

Taiga’s grip on his gun tightened, finger just shy of the trigger. “Let me make it real simple for you,” he continued, gaze flicking to yours for half a second before snapping back. “Stay away from what’s mine.”
